emails.subject: Re: For Whom The Bells Tolls...
emails.body: Re: For Whom The Bells Tolls... i don't know if you've heard yet. maybe you should talk to lavorato. my debt is currently trading at about 60-80 cents on the dollar.

emails.subject: Re: For Whom The Bells Tolls...
emails.body: Challenging your manhood would do me no good. I hope you're not suggesting that you're going to walk on a bet. If I owed you $2,320, what would you do? Greg Whalley@ECT 11/22/00 09:14 AM
